title: Post-review protocol spec/code alignment audit (last 20 commits)
description: Analyze recent commits touching lichen/subsys/lichen/link/, rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs, rust/lichen-coap/, schnorr48 etc. vs spec/drafts/draft-lichen-schnorr-00.md, spec/05-routing.md:9.2 announce format, spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md CCP-9, test/vectors/ccp9.json, draft-lichen-link-01.md frame formats. Found critical mismatches. Epic for fixes.
close_reason: Aligned announce wire format, parse/tx offsets, signed_data, MIN_LEN=93, struct, specs to match Rust+ccp9.json vector+CCP-9 (fixed C/Rust/spec mismatches from audit). Updated 4 files. Commit 63e9c3559. Remaining merge conflicts and other audit items filed as child beads.
